site.name: Yumme Momos Manufacturer
site.tagline: Love momo? You’ll never have just one.
site.description: B2B & franchise frozen-food maker from Jamshedpur — frozen veg momos, non-veg momos and French fries, made hygienically with real, quality-tested ingredients.

address.full: Bagun Nagar, Behind AIWC School, Near Church, Baridih, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand — 831017

site.hours: Mon–Sun · 9:30 AM – 7:30 PM · 365 days (special holidays only)
site.vision: Enabling and empowering individuals in transforming societies by serving convenient food that saves time and builds reliability and simplicity — created in an agile, innovative, trusted work environment backed by simple, sustainable systems.
site.mission: To deliver convenience in the daily food experience.

pillars.title: Delicious Food
pillars.body: Love momo? You’ll never have just one. Every bite is made to keep you coming back.

pillars.title: Authentic Taste
pillars.body: Cooked traditionally with native Himalayan herbs for a real, honest Himalayan flavour.

pillars.title: Real Ingredients
pillars.body: Only real, quality-tested ingredients — for the freshest, most authentic taste in every batch.

products.name: Veg Momo
products.desc: Classic garden-fresh vegetables, hand-folded and steamed to soft perfection.

products.name: Chicken Momo
products.desc: Juicy, well-spiced minced chicken filling in a delicate steamed wrapper.

products.name: Paneer Corn Momo
products.desc: Creamy paneer and sweet corn — a rich, satisfying vegetarian favourite.

products.name: Jain Veg Momo
products.desc: Onion & garlic-free, made to Jain preferences without compromising on taste.

products.name: Cheese Corn Momo
products.desc: Melty cheese and sweet corn — gooey, indulgent and irresistibly moreish.

products.name: Fish Momo
products.desc: Tender, delicately seasoned fish filling for a fresh coastal twist.

products.name: Mushroom Momo
products.desc: Earthy sautéed mushrooms with herbs — deep, savoury and wholesome.

products.name: Mutton Momo
products.desc: Robust, richly spiced mutton for those who love a hearty, bold bite.

products.name: Frozen French Fries
products.desc: Golden, crisp-cut fries — the perfect crunchy companion to any momo.

faqs.q: How do I place an order?
faqs.a: The fastest way is WhatsApp or a call — tap “Order on WhatsApp” or ring us on 9142081374 / 7209412954. You can also order and book through the Yumme Momos app.

Deliveries take a minimum of 1 day. You’ll get an order confirmation on the email or WhatsApp linked to your order.
